web.dashboard.title_no_recent_secrets.text: Kāore he karere huna ōnamata tata

web.dashboard.get_started_by_creating_yo.text: Tīmata mā te waihanga i tō karere huna tuatahi.

web.dashboard.fetch_error_title.text: Kāore e taea te uta raraunga

web.dashboard.fetch_error_description.text: He raruraru ki te uta i ōu raraunga. Tēnā ngana anō.
